title: 3D Printed Part
desc: Design a custom part & physically print it using 3D printer.
fullDesc: Design your own custom enclosure, bracket, or gadget using Tinkercad's 3D design tools. Then physically print it on the lab's 3D printer. You'll learn the basics of 3D modelling, understand how 3D printers work layer-by-layer, and get a real physical object you designed yourself! From CAD to reality in under an hour.
author: Tinkering Lab
